source.title: Characterizing a psychiatric symptom dimension related to deficits in goal-directed control

confidence_rationale: Large-N computational/dimensional evidence pinning failure-to-disengage to a precise, GRADED control parameter (model-based weight) selectively tied to a transdiagnostic compulsive/intrusive-thought dimension. Strong mechanistic sharpener of Gillan 2021. Correlational, non-clinical online samples -> licenses the existence and gradedness of the parameter, not a specific circuit.
failure_signatures: Action selection stops consulting the forward model of outcomes, so when a contingency/goal changes the agent keeps emitting the previously-cued response.
The deficit is a quantitative under-weighting (a dial turned down), producing graded perseveration that scales with compulsive/intrusive-thought symptom load.
Intrusive thoughts and compulsive acts co-load on one dimension -- the same disengage-control deficit yields both a thought-loop and an action-loop phenotype.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Reduced model-based (goal-directed) control is selectively and dimensionally associated with a transdiagnostic symptom dimension of compulsive behaviour and intrusive thought, dissociable from impulsivity -- behaviour stops being re-derived from current goals/outcomes and defaults to inflexible cue-driven responding.
mapping.ree_translation: Sharpens ARC-078 C3: failure-to-disengage is a GRADED control parameter (how much model-based re-evaluation is recruited), not a discrete on/off lesion. For REE this licenses treating the abandon/override pathway as a continuously-weighted recruitment of model-based re-evaluation whose under-weighting IS the pathology -- and shows the same deficit produces both rumination-like and compulsion-like phenotypes (one mechanism, two surface failures).
mapping.mapping_caveat: Online general-population samples (Mechanical Turk), not diagnosed patients; correlational -- it identifies an association between a computational parameter and self-reported compulsivity, licensing the existence/gradedness of a disengage-relevant parameter, not its implementation or causal circuit.
mapping.source_context: Two large general-population online samples; two-step model-based/model-free RL task; transdiagnostic self-report symptom dimensions.

confidence_components.notes: Rigorous large-N computational design, two independent samples, high specificity to the compulsive/intrusive dimension (high source quality). Mapping fidelity moderate-high (precise parameter; non-clinical sample). Transfer risk moderate (correlational).
